sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12955" key="a)pokro/thma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποκρότ-ημα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n12955.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">snap of the finger,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1187.tlg001:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristobul.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
